productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girls Layer Magenta Top
description: Composition Magenta round neck layered top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, sequinned embellishments on the front and a bow at the neck Fit Reuglar Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Warm iron Every mother loves to dress up her bundle of joy as a little princess. This top from doodle will make your little one look like a miniature version of princesses in the fairy tales you read her to sleep. Pair it with sandals from Croc and a cute hairband.
